visual_or_table: TP/TW sensor-to-1D path overlay and bounded/excluded sensor table
inputs: S7 package; TODO-PRED-SENSOR-MAP; final scorecard shell
required_outputs: path overlay; coordinate ledger table; bounded/excluded table; caption bank; source manifest
acceptance: Every visible TP/TW sensor is mapped bounded or excluded with reason
guardrail: No validation holdout or external temperature runtime input

visual_or_table: TW5/TW6 residual atlas and M3/prior-candidate comparison table
inputs: S8 package or current wall/test-section blocker audit; AMX/UMX/TSWFC packages; heat-loss Phase 0-5
required_outputs: residual atlas; scoreable/excluded probe map; candidate comparison table; captions
acceptance: Shows why wall/test-section remains dominant blocker or why one candidate is admission-ready
guardrail: Do not treat residual atlas as admitted wall/test-section closure

visual_or_table: Upcomer onset map, exchange QOI contract table, and hybrid schematic update
inputs: S4/S9 packages; upcomer exchange preflight; sampler design packages
required_outputs: onset-regime map; V_recirc/mdot_exchange/tau_recirc contract; missing-anchor/UQ table; captions
acceptance: Ordinary single-stream closure labels visibly disabled unless gates pass
guardrail: No ordinary upcomer Nu/f_D/K or exchange coefficient admission

visual_or_table: Pressure/F6 gate waterfall and candidate decision table
inputs: S10 package; same-QOI UQ Phase A-C; pressure-corner/F6 packages
required_outputs: gate waterfall; isolation/recirculation/UQ/source table; F3 comparison; captions
acceptance: Every row carries diagnostic/blocked/admitted label from source evidence
guardrail: No clipped K hidden multiplier component-K or F6 admission without all gates

visual_or_table: S0-S11 gate flow and blocked S6 scorecard shell
inputs: S0-S6 packages; final scorecard shell; predictive figure/table package
required_outputs: gate-flow diagram; frozen-candidate placeholder table; split-role shell table; caption bank
acceptance: Makes absent frozen candidate and zero final score values visible as rigorous status

inputs: Current figure plan; existing figures; all S7-S11 figure/table packages as they land
required_outputs: chapter placement ledger; source path ledger; caption/claim/caveat table; blocked trigger table
acceptance: Another agent can place figures/tables without chat context
guardrail: No promotion of diagnostic evidence to admitted closure
